0.q: Overexpression of SmPPDK promoted growth of C3 transgenic plants, enhancing their photosynthesis (CO2 assimilation) by lowering photorespiration under stress conditions.

1.q: PPDK (EC 2.7.9.1) is nuclear encoded, abundantly present in the chloroplasts of mesophyll cells, an important rate-limiting enzyme of the C4 pathway.

2.q: pyruvate phosphate dikinase (PPDK) located at the distal end of the chloroplast... an important rate-limiting enzyme of the C4 pathway
